title: RNA/DNA Extraction from Plankton Samples Using NucleoSpin Kits
author: Sarah Romac

steps.title: Lyse your plankton filter samples following the protocol
steps.instruction: Lyse your plankton filter samples following the protocol : https://www.protocols.io/edit/cryogrinding-protocol-mecanic-lysis-of-142mm-filte-beqpjdvn

steps.title: Depending of the plankton size fraction...
steps.instruction: Depending of the plankton size fraction samples you have, select : 1 - RNA/DNA extraction using NucleoSpin RNA MIDI kit regarding [>20µ] size fractions (samples collected and prefiltered using a plankton net) ; 2 - RNA/DNA extraction using NucleoSpin RNA MIDI and MINI kits regarding [<20µ] size fractions (samples collected using NIskin bottles or pumping and filtered on 142mm filters) ; 3 - RNA/DNA extraction using NucleoSpin RNA MINI kits regarding [<20µ] size fractions (samples collected using NIskin bottles or pumping and filtered on 47mm filters) ;

steps.title: In the Falcon50 tube containing the filter powder, add 3
steps.instruction: In the Falcon50 tube containing the filter powder, add 3.6 mL of RA1 and 36 µL of β-mercaptoethanol per sample. Vortex thoroughly. Incubate at room temperature for about 5 minutes. 00:05:00 Room temperature

steps.title: In the Falcon50 tube containing the...
steps.instruction: In the Falcon50 tube containing the filter powder, add 500µL of RA1 and 5µL of β-mercaptoethanol per sample. Vortex thoroughly. Incubate at room temperature for about 5 minutes. 00:05:00 Room temperature

steps.title: Transfer the lysate and the filter...
steps.instruction: Transfer the lysate and the filter on a Nucleospin Filter (violet ring) (from NucleoSpin RNA Mini kit) placed in a Collection Tube 2mL. Centrifuge 1 min at 11000g at 19°C. 11000 x g, 19 °C, 1 minute

steps.title: Discard the Nucleospin Filter
steps.instruction: Discard the Nucleospin Filter. Transfer the eluate in a new sterile microtube 2mL. Volume is around 550 µL .

steps.title: Add 700µL EtOH 70% to the...
steps.instruction: Add 700µL EtOH 70% to the filtrate and pipette up and down at least 5 times to mix. Volume is around 1250 µL .

steps.title: Transfer 600µL from the lysate/ethanol-mix in...
steps.instruction: Transfer 600µL from the lysate/ethanol-mix in a NucleoSpin RNA column (light blue ring) placed in a Collection Tube. (from NucleoSpin RNA Mini kit) Centrifuge 30s at 11000g at 19°C. 11000 x g, 19 °C, 30 seconds Discard flow through and replace the NucleoSpin RNA column on the Collection Tube.

steps.title: Repeat Step 7 until all the...
steps.instruction: Repeat Step 7 until all the volume lysate/ethanol-mix have been passed through the NucleoSpin RNA column (light blue ring).

steps.title: Add 500µL DNA Wash to the NucleoSpin RNA column
steps.instruction: Add 500µL DNA Wash to the NucleoSpin RNA column. Centrifuge 1min at 11000g. 11000 x g, 19 °C, 1 minute Discard the flow-through and reuse Collection Tube;

steps.title: Add again 500µL DNA Wash to the NucleoSpin RNA column
steps.instruction: Add again 500µL DNA Wash to the NucleoSpin RNA column. Centrifuge 1min at 11000g. 11000 x g, 19 °C, 1 minute Discard the flow-through and place the Column in a 1.5mL sterile microtube correctly annotated (Sample code, DNA extraction date, operator).

steps.title: Let dry the column for 3min at room temperature
steps.instruction: Let dry the column for 3min at room temperature. 00:03:00 Room temperature

steps.title: Add 100µL DNA Elute (preheated to...
steps.instruction: Add 100µL DNA Elute (preheated to 50°C ) directly onto the membrane and incubate 1 min at room temperature. 00:01:00 Room temperature Centrifuge 1min at 11000g; 11000 x g, 19 °C, 1 minute Place the NucleoSpin RNA MINI column into ta new 15mL Collection tube for the following DNA digestion (see Step 14).

steps.title: Store DNA extracts at -20°C
steps.instruction: Store DNA extracts at -20°C. 100 µL -20 °C

steps.title: Prepare DNase mix
steps.instruction: Prepare DNase mix : 90µL Reaction Buffer for DNase + 10µL reconstituted rDNase per sample and mix gently. - for 10 samples: 900µl + 10µl ; - for 17 samples: 1530µl + 170µl ; Apply 95µL DNase Mix directly onto the center of the column and incubate 15 min at room temperature. 00:15:00 Room temperature

steps.title: Add 200µL RAW2 (inactivation of the rDNase)
steps.instruction: Add 200µL RAW2 (inactivation of the rDNase). Incubate at room temperature for 1min. Centrifuge 30s at 11000g. 11000 x g, 19 °C, 30 seconds Place the Column into a new Collection Tube.

steps.title: Add 600µL RA3
steps.instruction: Add 600µL RA3. Centrifuge 30s at 11000g. 11000 x g, 19 °C, 30 seconds Discard flow-through and replace the column into the Collection Tube.

steps.title: Add 250µL RA3
steps.instruction: Add 250µL RA3. Centrifuge 2min at 11000g. 11000 x g, 19 °C, 2 minutes Discard flow-through and place the Column in a sterile microtube correctly annotated (Sample code, DNA extraction date, operator).

steps.title: Add 30µL RNase-free water (preheated to...
steps.instruction: Add 30µL RNase-free water (preheated to 50°C) directly onto the membrane . Incubate 1min at room temperature. 00:01:00 Room temperature Centrifuge 1min at 11000g. 11000 x g, 19 °C, 1 minute

steps.title: Repeat step 18 by eluting with the same eluate
steps.instruction: Repeat step 18 by eluting with the same eluate. Discard the NucleoSpin RNA MINI column.

steps.title: Store RNA extracts at -80°C
steps.instruction: Store RNA extracts at -80°C.

steps.title: Transfer the lysate and the filter...
steps.instruction: Transfer the lysate and the filter on a Nucleospin Filter placed in a Collection Tube 15 mL. (from NucleoSpin RNA MIDI kit) Centrifuge 10 min at 4500g at 19°C 4500 x g, 19 °C, 10 minutes

steps.title: Discard the Nucleospin Filter
steps.instruction: Discard the Nucleospin Filter. Transfer the eluate in a new sterile Falcon15mL tube. Volume is around 3.7 mL .

steps.title: Add 4 mL EtOH 70% to...
steps.instruction: Add 4 mL EtOH 70% to the filtrate and and vortex 2 x 5 sec to mix. Volume is around 7.7 mL .

steps.title: Transfer 3 mL from the lysate/ethanol-mix...
steps.instruction: Transfer 3 mL from the lysate/ethanol-mix in a NucleoSpin RNA MIDI column placed in a Collection Tube 15mL. (from NucleoSpin RNA MIDI kit) Centrifuge 3min at 4500g at 19°C. 4500 x g, 19 °C, 3 minutes Discard flow through and replace the NucleoSpin RNA MIDI column on the Collection Tube.

steps.title: Repeat Step 7 until all the...
steps.instruction: Repeat Step 7 until all the volume lysate/ethanol-mix have been passed through the NucleoSpin RNAMDI column.

steps.title: Add 2
steps.instruction: Add 2.5mL DNA Wash to the NucleoSpin RNA MDI column. Centrifuge 3min at 4500g at 19°C. 4500 x g, 19 °C, 3 minutes Discard the flow-through and reuse Collection Tube;

steps.title: Add again 2
steps.instruction: Add again 2.5mL DNA Wash to the NucleoSpin RNA column. Centrifuge 3min at 4500g at 19°C. 4500 x g, 19 °C, 3 minutes Discard the flow-through and place the Column in a new sterile Falcon15mL.

steps.title: Let dry the column for 5min at room temperature
steps.instruction: Let dry the column for 5min at room temperature. 00:05:00 Room temperature

steps.title: Add 300µL DNA Elute (preheated to...
steps.instruction: Add 300µL DNA Elute (preheated to 50°C ) directly onto the membrane and incubate 5 min at room temperature. 00:05:00 Room temperature Centrifuge 3min at 11000g; 11000 x g, 19 °C, 3 minutes Place the NucleoSpin RNA MIDI column into ta new 15mL Collection tube for the following DNA digestion (see Step 14).

steps.title: Transfer the DNA extract on a sterile 1
steps.instruction: Transfer the DNA extract on a sterile 1.5mL sterile microtube correctly annotated (Sample code, DNA extraction date, operator). Store DNA extracts at -20°C.

steps.title: Prepare DNase mix
steps.instruction: Prepare DNase mix : 235µL Reaction Buffer for DNase + 25µL reconstituted rDNase per sample and mix gently. - for 10 samples: 2350µl + 250µl ; - for 17 samples: 3995µl + 425µl ; Apply 235µL DNase Mix directly onto the center of the column and incubate 15 min at room temperature. 00:15:00 Room temperature

steps.title: Add 2
steps.instruction: Add 2.6mL RAW2 (inactivation of the rDNase). Incubate at room temperature for 1min. Centrifuge 3min at 4500g. 4500 x g, 19 °C, 3 minutes Place the Column into a new Collection Tube.

steps.title: Centrifuge 3minmin at 454500g
steps.instruction: Centrifuge 3minmin at 454500g. 4500 x g, 19 °C, 3 minutes PlaPce the ColCmn into a na newCollection Tube.

steps.title: Add 2
steps.instruction: Add 2.6mL RA3. Centrifuge 5min at 4500g. 4500 x g, 19 °C, 5 minutes Discard flow-through and place the NucleoSpin RNA MIDI column into ta new Falcon 15mL tube.

steps.title: Add 300µL RNase-free water (preheated to...
steps.instruction: Add 300µL RNase-free water (preheated to 50°C) directly onto the membrane . Incubate 2min at room temperature. 00:02:00 Room temperature Centrifuge 3min at 4500g. 4500 x g, 19 °C, 3 minutes

steps.title: Repeat step 18 by eluting with the same eluate
steps.instruction: Repeat step 18 by eluting with the same eluate. Discard the NucleoSpin RNA MIDI column.

steps.title: Transfer the RNA extract on a sterile 1
steps.instruction: Transfer the RNA extract on a sterile 1.5mL sterile microtube correctly annotated (Sample code, RNA extraction date, operator). Store RNA extract at -80°C.

steps.title: In the Falcon50 tube containing the filter powder, add 3
steps.instruction: In the Falcon50 tube containing the filter powder, add 3.6 mL of RA1 and 36 µL of β-mercaptoethanol per sample. Vortex thoroughly. Incubate at room temperature for about 5 minutes. 00:05:00 Room temperature

steps.title: Transfer the lysate and the filter...
steps.instruction: Transfer the lysate and the filter on a Nucleospin Filter placed in a Collection Tube 15 mL. (from NucleoSpin RNA MIDI kit) Centrifuge 10 min at 4500g at 19°C 4500 x g, 19 °C, 10 minutes

steps.title: Discard the Nucleospin Filter
steps.instruction: Discard the Nucleospin Filter. Transfer the eluate in a new sterile Falcon15mL tube. Volume is around 3.7 mL .

steps.title: Add 4 mL EtOH 70% to...
steps.instruction: Add 4 mL EtOH 70% to the filtrate and and vortex 2 x 5 sec to mix. Volume is around 7.7 mL .

steps.title: Transfer 600µL from the lysate/ethanol-mix in...
steps.instruction: Transfer 600µL from the lysate/ethanol-mix in a NucleoSpin RNA column (light blue ring) placed in a Collection Tube. (from NucleoSpin RNA Mini kit) Centrifuge 30s at 11000g at 19°C. 11000 x g, 19 °C, 30 seconds Discard flow through and replace the NucleoSpin RNA column on the Collection Tube.

steps.title: Repeat Step 7 until all the...
steps.instruction: Repeat Step 7 until all the volume lysate/ethanol-mix have been passed through the NucleoSpin RNA column (light blue ring).

steps.title: Add 600µL DNA Wash to the NucleoSpin RNA column
steps.instruction: Add 600µL DNA Wash to the NucleoSpin RNA column. Centrifuge 1min at 11000g. 11000 x g, 19 °C, 1 minute Discard the flow-through and reuse Collection Tube;

steps.title: Add again 600µL DNA Wash to the NucleoSpin RNA column
steps.instruction: Add again 600µL DNA Wash to the NucleoSpin RNA column. Centrifuge 1min at 11000g. 11000 x g, 19 °C, 1 minute

steps.title: Let dry the column for 3min at room temperature
steps.instruction: Let dry the column for 3min at room temperature. 00:03:00 Room temperature

steps.title: Add 100µL DNA Elute (preheated to...
steps.instruction: Add 100µL DNA Elute (preheated to 50°C ) directly onto the membrane and incubate 2 min at room temperature. 00:02:00 Room temperature Centrifuge 1min at 11000g; 11000 x g, 19 °C, 1 minute Place the NucleoSpin RNA MINI column into ta new 2mL Collection tube for the following DNA digestion (see Step 15).

steps.title: Take an aliquot of 5µL for...
steps.instruction: Take an aliquot of 5µL for quantification (Qubit, Bioanalyzer, and Nanodrop). Store DNA extracts at -20°C. 100 µL -20 °C

steps.title: Prepare DNase mix
steps.instruction: Prepare DNase mix : 90µL Reaction Buffer for DNase + 10µL reconstituted rDNase per sample and mix gently. - for 10 samples: 900µl + 10µl ; - for 17 samples: 1530µl + 170µl ; Apply 95µL DNase Mix directly onto the center of the column and incubate 15 min at room temperature. 00:15:00 Room temperature

steps.title: Add 200µL RAW2 (inactivation of the rDNase)
steps.instruction: Add 200µL RAW2 (inactivation of the rDNase). Incubate at room temperature for 1min. Centrifuge 30s at 11000g. 11000 x g, 19 °C, 30 seconds Place the Column into a new Collection Tube.

steps.title: Add 600µL RA3
steps.instruction: Add 600µL RA3. Centrifuge 30s at 11000g. 11000 x g, 19 °C, 30 seconds Discard flow-through and replace the column into the Collection Tube.

steps.title: Add 600µL ETOH 96-100%
steps.instruction: Add 600µL ETOH 96-100%. Centrifuge 30s at 11000g. 11000 x g, 19 °C, 30 seconds Discard flow-through and replace the column into the Collection Tube.

steps.title: Add 30µL RNase-free water (preheated to...
steps.instruction: Add 30µL RNase-free water (preheated to 50°C) directly onto the membrane . Incubate 2min at room temperature. 00:02:00 Room temperature Centrifuge 1min at 11000g. 11000 x g, 19 °C, 1 minute

steps.title: Repeat step 21 by eluting with the same eluate
steps.instruction: Repeat step 21 by eluting with the same eluate. Discard the NucleoSpin RNA MINI column.

steps.title: Process directly to the TurboDNase treatment...
steps.instruction: Process directly to the TurboDNase treatment (Turbo-DNA free TM kit, Ambion AM1907).

steps.title: Add again 600µL DNA Wash to the NucleoSpin RNA column
steps.instruction: Add again 600µL DNA Wash to the NucleoSpin RNA column. Centrifuge 1min at 11000g. 11000 x g, 19 °C, 1 minute Discard the flow-through and place the Column in a 1.5mL sterile microtube correctly annotated (Sample code, DNA extraction date, operator).

steps.title: Add 600µL RA3
steps.instruction: Add 600µL RA3. Centrifuge 30s at 11000g. 11000 x g, 19 °C, 30 seconds Discard flow-through and replace the column into the Collection Tube.

steps.title: Centrifuge 2min at 11000g
steps.instruction: Centrifuge 2min at 11000g. 11000 x g, 19 °C, 2 minutes Discard flow-through and place the Column in a 1.5mL sterile microtube correctly annotated (Sample code, RNA extraction date, operator).
